9.anchor: and be found in him, not having a righteousness of my own that comes from the law, but that which is through faith in

15.anchor: so that you may become blameless and pure, “children of God without fault in a warped and crooked generation.”

23.anchor: The grace of the Lord Jesus Christ be with your spirit. Amen.
23.note: Some manuscripts do not have Amen

1.anchor: To all God’s holy people in Christ Jesus at Philippi, together with the overseers and deacons

12.anchor: Now I want you to know, brothers and sisters,
12.note: The Greek word for brothers and sisters

13.anchor: As a result, it has become clear throughout the whole palace guard

19.anchor: for I know that through your prayers and God’s provision of the Spirit of Jesus Christ what has happened to me will turn out for my deliverance.

27.anchor: Whatever happens, conduct yourselves in a manner worthy of the gospel of Christ. Then, whether I come and see you or only hear about you in my absence, I will know that you stand firm in the one Spirit,
